titleEn: The Goose That Laid the Golden Eggs
summaryAm: በየቀኑ ልዩ ስጦታ የምትሰጥ ዝይን በምስጋና መንከባከብ የሚያስተምር ለልጆች የተለሳለሰ ታሪክ።
moralAm: ትዕግሥትና ምስጋና ደስታን ያበዛሉ፤ ስግብግብነት ግን ያለንን ያሳንሳል።

source.name: Aesop's Fables
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened conflict.

pages.textAm: በአንድ ትንሽ እርሻ ላይ አንዲት ለስላሳ ዝይ ትኖር ነበር። ባለቤቷ በየጠዋቱ ውኃ እና እህል ይሰጣት ነበር።
pages.textEn: On a small farm lived a gentle goose cared for every morning.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A gentle goose in a warm farmyard beside a small bowl of grain and water.

pages.textAm: አንድ ጠዋት ባለቤቷ በጎጆዋ ውስጥ የሚያበራ ወርቃማ እንቁላል አገኘ። በጣም ተገረመና “እንዴት ያማረ ስጦታ ነው!” አለ።
pages.textEn: One morning he found a shining golden egg and felt amazed.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A farmer discovers one glowing golden egg in the goose's cozy nest.

pages.textAm: በሚቀጥለው ቀንም ሌላ ወርቃማ እንቁላል አገኘ። ቤተሰቡ ደስ አላቸው፣ ዝይዋንም በትህትና አመሰገኑ።
pages.textEn: The next day there was another golden egg, and the family gave thanks.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A small family smiles with gratitude near the goose and a golden egg.

pages.textAm: ቀኖች እየተከተሉ ሲሄዱ ባለቤቱ ብዙ ነገር መግዛት ጀመረ። ግን ልቡ በምስጋና ፋንታ በተጨማሪ ፍላጎት ተሞላ።
pages.textEn: As days passed, the farmer began wanting more instead of feeling thankful.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The farmer counts coins thoughtfully while the goose rests safely nearby.

pages.textAm: “ለምን በየቀኑ አንድ ብቻ እጠብቃለሁ?” ብሎ አሰበ። “ሁሉንም ወርቃማ እንቁላል አሁን ማግኘት እፈልጋለሁ!”
pages.textEn: He wondered why he should wait for one egg each day.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The farmer looks impatient while the goose watches gently in the farmyard.

pages.textAm: ቤተሰቡ ግን “ዝይዋን በደግነት እንንከባከብ፤ ስጦታዋንም በትዕግሥት እንቀበል” አሉት። እሱ ግን ትዕግሥት አጣ።
pages.textEn: His family reminded him to care for the goose kindly and wait patiently.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The family gently talks with the farmer beside the calm goose.

pages.textAm: ባለቤቱ በችኮላ ዝይዋን ሲያስፈራት እሷ ከጎጆዋ ርቃ ወደ ጸጥ ያለ ሜዳ ሄደች። ከዚያ በኋላ ወርቃማ እንቁላል አልተገኘም።
pages.textEn: When the farmer rushed her, the goose moved away to a quiet meadow.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The goose walks safely toward a quiet meadow while the farmer looks regretful.

pages.textAm: ባለቤቱ ተናዘዘ። “በትዕግሥት እና በምስጋና መኖር ነበረብኝ” አለ። ከዚያ ቀን ጀምሮ ያለውን ማመስገን ተማረ።
pages.textEn: The farmer learned to live with patience and gratitude.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The farmer peacefully tends the farm with a humble, grateful expression.
